hero.headline: Plan a Texas home decision with local context
hero.dek: Compare markets, products, and experts across a state with sharply different regions.

rights_record.usage_notes: Draft planning placeholder; no asset has been selected or acquired. Publishing is prohibited.

hero.alt_text: Pending asset depicting everyday Texas life across more than one ecological region.

visual_truths: Show more than one Texas landscape, such as Gulf prairie, Hill Country limestone, pine woods, plains, or Trans-Pecos terrain.
Include ordinary housing or a lived-in streetscape rather than an isolated vista.
Use vegetation and hard summer light appropriate to the selected Texas region.
misleading_stereotypes_to_avoid: A lone cowboy, cattle, or oil pump as shorthand for the whole state.
One generic desert scene presented as representative of all Texas.
local_evidence_brief.desired_lived_behavior: Residents walking, talking, or arriving home in a recognizable neighborhood setting.
local_evidence_brief.required_season_or_weather: Regionally plausible daylight; avoid rare dramatic weather.
local_evidence_brief.crop_safe_focal_subject: One resident-scale activity with landscape and housing cues retained in both crops.

hero.headline: Compare California markets beyond a single postcard
hero.dek: Explore housing decisions across coastal, valley, mountain, and inland communities.

rights_record.usage_notes: Draft planning placeholder; no asset has been selected or acquired. Publishing is prohibited.

hero.alt_text: Pending asset showing lived-in California housing across distinct terrain.

visual_truths: Represent California's coast ranges, Central Valley, Sierra, or inland dry landscapes without collapsing them into one view.
Include housing and an everyday resident activity.
Use vegetation, slope, and light consistent with the selected subregion.
misleading_stereotypes_to_avoid: Hollywood signs, red carpets, or celebrity luxury as statewide shorthand.
A beach-only image implying all Californians live on the coast.
local_evidence_brief.desired_lived_behavior: A resident moving through a neighborhood, trail, or shared outdoor space.
local_evidence_brief.required_season_or_weather: Dry or wet-season cues must match the selected subregion.
local_evidence_brief.crop_safe_focal_subject: A human-scale neighborhood moment with terrain visible around it.

hero.headline: See Colorado housing in its real regional context
hero.dek: Compare Front Range, plains, mountain, and Western Slope home decisions.

rights_record.usage_notes: Draft planning placeholder; no asset has been selected or acquired. Publishing is prohibited.

hero.alt_text: Pending asset showing Colorado residents near varied housing and terrain.

visual_truths: Show the relationship among populated corridors, high plains, foothills, or mountains rather than mountains alone.
Include regionally plausible housing and water-wise vegetation.
Use strong high-elevation light and seasonally credible sky or snow conditions.
misleading_stereotypes_to_avoid: A ski resort or luxury chalet standing in for the whole state.
Permanent deep snow in ordinary Front Range neighborhoods.
local_evidence_brief.desired_lived_behavior: Residents walking, cycling, or using a neighborhood open space as part of daily life.
local_evidence_brief.required_season_or_weather: Season must be explicit and internally consistent.
local_evidence_brief.crop_safe_focal_subject: A resident-scale foreground with both housing and terrain surviving mobile crop.

hero.headline: Plan for Florida homes, water, and regional tradeoffs
hero.dek: Explore housing across coastal, inland, subtropical, and northern Florida communities.

rights_record.usage_notes: Draft planning placeholder; no asset has been selected or acquired. Publishing is prohibited.

hero.alt_text: Pending asset showing everyday Florida housing with regionally accurate water and vegetation.

visual_truths: Show water, wetlands, dunes, mangroves, flatwoods, or inland lakes only where appropriate to the chosen region.
Include ordinary housing and shaded outdoor life.
Use humid light, storm-ready details, or tropical and subtropical vegetation without exaggeration.
misleading_stereotypes_to_avoid: A resort beach or theme park as shorthand for the entire state.
Endless palms with no neighborhood or regional distinction.
local_evidence_brief.desired_lived_behavior: Residents walking, cycling, or gathering near a lived-in neighborhood and water-aware landscape.
local_evidence_brief.required_season_or_weather: Warm humid conditions without sensational hurricane imagery.
local_evidence_brief.crop_safe_focal_subject: A grounded resident activity with housing and one water or vegetation cue.

hero.headline: Understand Austin beyond the downtown skyline
hero.dek: Use neighborhood, inventory, and local expert context to plan your next move.

rights_record.usage_notes: Draft planning placeholder; no asset has been selected or acquired. Publishing is prohibited.

hero.alt_text: Pending Austin neighborhood scene with residents, limestone terrain, and a connected urban trail.

visual_truths: Limestone, creek, greenbelt, or oak and cedar vegetation tied to Central Texas.
A neighborhood-scale mix of homes rather than only downtown towers.
People walking, biking, or rolling on a trail that connects neighborhoods and parks.
misleading_stereotypes_to_avoid: A music-stage or cowboy tableau with no residential context.
The State Capitol or skyline as the sole local signal.
local_evidence_brief.desired_lived_behavior: A resident using an urban trail for an ordinary neighborhood trip.
local_evidence_brief.required_season_or_weather: Bright warm-season light with credible heat-aware clothing and shade.
local_evidence_brief.crop_safe_focal_subject: A trail user offset right with creek, vegetation, and nearby housing retained.

hero.headline: Compare Dallas homes through real neighborhood texture
hero.dek: See how housing, streets, parks, and local choices shape the market.

rights_record.usage_notes: Draft planning placeholder; no asset has been selected or acquired. Publishing is prohibited.

hero.alt_text: Pending Dallas neighborhood scene with homes, shade trees, and connected public space.

visual_truths: North Texas prairie light and broad-canopy street trees where locally present.
A residential block with varied detached homes, apartments, or infill.
A park, trail, sidewalk, or public-realm connection used by residents.
misleading_stereotypes_to_avoid: Glass towers and freeways as the only Dallas identity.
Ranch gates, cattle, or western props disconnected from city life.
local_evidence_brief.desired_lived_behavior: Neighbors walking a dog, pushing a stroller, or heading toward a park.
local_evidence_brief.required_season_or_weather: Clear warm light with credible shade and vegetation.
local_evidence_brief.crop_safe_focal_subject: Residents on a sidewalk or trail with home fronts and trees visible.

hero.headline: Plan a Houston move with bayou and neighborhood context
hero.dek: Compare housing, insurance, equity, and experts across a sprawling Gulf Coast city.

rights_record.usage_notes: Draft planning placeholder; no asset has been selected or acquired. Publishing is prohibited.

hero.alt_text: Pending Houston scene connecting a lived-in neighborhood to a bayou greenway.

visual_truths: Flat Gulf Coast terrain with bayou, drainage, or flood-aware landscape cues.
A varied neighborhood of bungalows, townhomes, apartments, or newer infill.
Residents using a bayou greenway, neighborhood park, or shaded sidewalk.
misleading_stereotypes_to_avoid: Oil derricks or mission-control imagery with no home context.
A generic downtown skyline presented as daily Houston life.
local_evidence_brief.desired_lived_behavior: A resident walking or cycling between neighborhood and bayou green space.
local_evidence_brief.required_season_or_weather: Humid, warm light; no disaster or active-flood depiction.
local_evidence_brief.crop_safe_focal_subject: A person on a greenway with bayou edge and housing context retained.

hero.headline: See Irvine through villages, trails, and open space
hero.dek: Compare planned neighborhoods, home types, and local financing paths.

rights_record.usage_notes: Draft planning placeholder; no asset has been selected or acquired. Publishing is prohibited.

hero.alt_text: Pending Irvine scene with a village edge, trail users, and dry foothill vegetation.

visual_truths: Master-planned village housing with landscaped setbacks or shared green space.
Dry San Joaquin Hills or preserved open-space vegetation at a neighborhood edge.
Residents walking or biking on an interconnected trail.
misleading_stereotypes_to_avoid: An oceanfront scene—Irvine is inland from the coast.
A sterile corporate campus with no residential life.
local_evidence_brief.desired_lived_behavior: A family or individual using a trail between a village and open space.
local_evidence_brief.required_season_or_weather: Dry Mediterranean-climate light and water-conscious landscaping.
local_evidence_brief.crop_safe_focal_subject: Trail users with both village architecture and foothill vegetation.

hero.headline: Understand San Diego from canyon to neighborhood
hero.dek: Compare coastal-region homes, VA options, affordability, and local expertise.

rights_record.usage_notes: Draft planning placeholder; no asset has been selected or acquired. Publishing is prohibited.

hero.alt_text: Pending San Diego neighborhood scene shaped by a canyon, dry vegetation, and everyday trail use.

local_evidence_brief.selected_asset_geography: Pending exact-city selection for San Diego
visual_truths: A neighborhood edge visibly shaped by one of the city's canyons or mesas.
Dry coastal-scrub vegetation and regionally plausible low-rise housing.
Residents walking or hiking close to home in open space.
misleading_stereotypes_to_avoid: A beach postcard with no neighborhood context.
Palm trees and perfect surf presented as the whole city.
local_evidence_brief.desired_lived_behavior: A resident entering a neighborhood canyon trail for an ordinary walk.
local_evidence_brief.required_season_or_weather: Soft coastal or bright dry-season light consistent with the location.
local_evidence_brief.crop_safe_focal_subject: A trail user on the canyon rim with housing and native vegetation visible.

hero.headline: Plan a Sacramento move under the real tree canopy

rights_record.usage_notes: Draft planning placeholder; no asset has been selected or acquired. Publishing is prohibited.

hero.alt_text: Pending Sacramento scene with a shaded residential street, residents, and river-city cues.

visual_truths: Mature shade trees on an established residential block.
Flat valley terrain with Sacramento or American River context where visible.
Residents biking, walking, or caring for a neighborhood tree.
misleading_stereotypes_to_avoid: The State Capitol as the sole city identity.
A generic arid California suburb with no canopy or river context.
local_evidence_brief.desired_lived_behavior: A resident biking or walking beneath street trees toward a neighborhood destination.
local_evidence_brief.required_season_or_weather: Warm dry-season light with credible deep shade.
local_evidence_brief.crop_safe_focal_subject: A person beneath a mature tree with home fronts and street texture retained.

hero.headline: Compare Denver homes with Front Range context
hero.dek: Connect neighborhood choices, relocation planning, and local mortgage expertise.

rights_record.usage_notes: Draft planning placeholder; no asset has been selected or acquired. Publishing is prohibited.

hero.alt_text: Pending Denver scene with a lived-in neighborhood, parkway, and distant Front Range.

visual_truths: A walkable block of brick homes, bungalows, apartments, or infill rather than only downtown.
High-plains vegetation and strong light with the Front Range as background, not subject.
Residents using a parkway, bike route, or neighborhood park.
misleading_stereotypes_to_avoid: A ski slope or alpine cabin presented as Denver.
A giant mountain composite looming unrealistically over downtown.
local_evidence_brief.desired_lived_behavior: A resident walking or cycling through an established neighborhood.
local_evidence_brief.required_season_or_weather: A clearly plausible season; snow only when streets, clothing, and vegetation agree.
local_evidence_brief.crop_safe_focal_subject: A resident and home frontage with subtle mountain or parkway context.

hero.headline: See Colorado Springs where neighborhoods meet foothills
hero.dek: Compare VA paths, local inventory, and home choices below Pikes Peak.

rights_record.usage_notes: Draft planning placeholder; no asset has been selected or acquired. Publishing is prohibited.

hero.alt_text: Pending Colorado Springs neighborhood scene with trail users, foothills, and red-rock terrain.

local_evidence_brief.selected_asset_geography: Pending exact-city selection for Colorado Springs
visual_truths: Neighborhoods at the base of Pikes Peak or along foothill mesas.
Red-rock formations, grassland, canyon, or ponderosa vegetation where locally accurate.
Residents walking, running, or biking on a multi-use trail.
misleading_stereotypes_to_avoid: Garden of the Gods rocks with no lived-in city context.
A remote alpine village or ski-town scene.
local_evidence_brief.desired_lived_behavior: A resident using a neighborhood-connected trail rather than posing at a landmark.
local_evidence_brief.required_season_or_weather: Dry high-altitude light with seasonally accurate vegetation.
local_evidence_brief.crop_safe_focal_subject: A trail user with a neighborhood edge and foothill cue in frame.

hero.alt_text: Pending Boulder scene with residents, compact housing, foothills, and open space.

visual_truths: The abrupt meeting of neighborhoods, grassland open space, and foothills.
Compact homes, apartments, or established residential blocks.
Residents walking, cycling, or using a trail as an everyday routine.
misleading_stereotypes_to_avoid: The Flatirons alone with no evidence of city life.
An all-luxury mountain enclave or ski-resort aesthetic.
local_evidence_brief.desired_lived_behavior: A resident traveling by bike or foot between home and open space.

visual_truths: A real mix of bungalow, ranch, detached, multifamily, or waterfront housing.
Grand oaks, subtropical vegetation, and shade on a lived-in block.
Residents walking near the Hillsborough River, a neighborhood park, or connected waterfront.
misleading_stereotypes_to_avoid: A resort beach implying Tampa is an oceanfront beach city.

Tree-lined or brick streets with bungalows, Mediterranean Revival, Tudor, or other documented local styles.
Residents walking, running, or cycling between homes and lakeside space.

Tropical hardwood hammock, mangrove, or dense subtropical canopy where locally accurate.
Everyday neighborhood life with Biscayne Bay or water-awareness as supporting context.
